results.title: Patrick Mahomes and Brittany Mahomes' Kansas City Current unveil massive $1.4 billion stadium expansion plans
results.description: The Kansas City Current have unveiled a $1.4 billion expansion of CPKC Stadium, increasing capacity from 11,500 to 18,000 seats while adding a parking garage and riverfront development. Minority owners Patrick and Brittany Mahomes continue backing the club's growth. Founded in 2020, the Current have become an NWSL powerhouse, finishing runners-up in 2022, winning the NWSL Shield, and becoming the first team to sell out every home match in 2024.

results.title: New autopsy of baby killed by police in US deepens outrage
results.description: The infant was killed after police were called to a Walmart parking lot about diapers that may have been shoplifted.

results.title: Dansby Swanson has 3 homers and 8 RBIs as the Cubs pound the Padres 23-3
results.description: Dansby Swanson hit three home runs, including a grand slam, Michael Conforto homered twice and the Chicago Cubs pounded the San Diego Padres 23-3 on Wednesday. Swanson had a career-high eight RBIs - second-most in major league history from a player batting ninth. Seiya Suzuki, Pete Crow-Armstrong and Michael Busch also homered for the Cubs, who scored their most runs in a home game since 1977. Swanson, who hit two home runs Tuesday, became the first Cub with back-to-back multihomer games since Patrick Wisdom in August 2021. He has nine home runs and 29 RBIs over the past 13 games.
